name: build-feature-mode
responsibility: Modifications to build.md for feature mode and greenfield mode. Feature mode: worktrees branch from existing code. Both modes: trigger profile writer after build completion.

input_schema.description: Prompt-level: build.md reads mode=feature and adjusts worktree creation to branch from current HEAD instead of empty branch

output_schema.description: Worktrees created from existing code, not empty branches. Workers receive existing codebase context.

input_schema.description: Prompt-level: build.md appends a profile write step after successful build completion. Invokes MOD-002 writeProfileFromArtifacts.

output_schema.description: Profile layers updated. Summary of what was written displayed to user.

input_schema.description: Prompt-level: build.md reads feature slug from mode context and writes all build artifacts to specs/features/feat-xxx/

output_schema.description: build_report.json, build_review.json, tests.json written to feature directory

nfr_constraints.other: Profile write trigger fires for BOTH greenfield and feature mode (REQ-002-AC-2). This is the only greenfield modification (INV-001). Profile write must not modify specs/ artifacts (INV-004).
